title: lithocardium album
intro: Lithocardium album, also known as Lithospermum album, is a flowering plant native to Europe and Asia. It has been traditionally used as a medicinal plant, with its roots and leaves containing compounds with diuretic and expectorant properties. The plant's medicinal properties include reducing inflammation and relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Lithocardium album can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, and is often used to promote overall health and well-being.
intro_study: According to "Farmakologiia i toksikologiia", lithocardium album exhibits antiarrhythmic action and increases coronary circulation rate, which can help to stabilize heart rhythms and improve heart function.
